hits.context:
Using your vast knowledge of the dark arts, you can open a rift into the shadow realm to send you straight to Startington.
Unfortunately, it doesn't seem like you can fit any supplies through the rift.
Unlocked at 300 Dark Magic and 100 Spatiomancy.
hits.disposition: reviewed acceptable world reference outside branch-critical nodes

hits.context: Opening the Rift:⮀ Angering the gods just to reach the shadow realm is so much work, and makes you feel a bit bad inside. Thinking back to your lessons with the witch, you conjure a huge amount of destructive and chaotic energy and begin to fray at the fabric between worlds. After a long and strenuous period of brutally exhausting work, you finally feel something give, and the dark energy seems to evaporate. In its place, a small rift has been torn through reality, big enough to fit through and stable enough that it won't shred you to pieces. You can't say the same for the threadbare bags of supplies you've haggled for so many times, but it's quite a feat even so. Excited, you eagerly step across to Startington!]]>
hits.disposition: reviewed acceptable world reference outside branch-critical nodes

hits.context: Action failed with low reputation:⮀ The hermit refuses to allow you near his workstations and potion brewing equipment no matter how much you ask and offer to pay. He tells you that you don't have a good enough karma for him to even be willing to risk you using his workstations and potion benches.]]>
hits.rationale: Mechanical reputation gate in a non-branch action story.

hits.context: Action failed with low reputation:⮀ The hermit refuses to allow you near his workstations and potion brewing equipment no matter how much you ask and offer to pay. He tells you that you don't have a good enough karma for him to even be willing to risk you using his workstations and potion benches.]]>
hits.rationale: Mechanical reputation gate in a non-branch action story.

hits.context: 300 Dark magic: As you become more skilled, the number of applications continues to grow. Now you are learning to connect to the Shadow Realm, a world parallel to this one and soaked in dark energy. Unfortunately, whenever you reach for it, all you find is chaos. Trisha says there are stable places in that realm, but you have to know what you are looking for before it will look back.]]>
hits.disposition: reviewed acceptable world reference outside branch-critical nodes

hits.context: Action failed with low reputation:⮀ You're not sure if it's the conspicuous winning streak or the smell of alcohol on your breath, but it seems casino security has decided to evict you. Big, intimidating thugs practically drag you out, and by the looks on their faces they don't want to see you again anytime soon.]]>
hits.rationale: Mechanical reputation gate in a non-branch action story.

hits.context: Action failed with low reputation:⮀ You hardly get time to take a breath and start your spiel about the alleged charity you represent before a look of recognition comes over the God, and they slam the door on you right away. Guess it's time to lie low before you get kicked out entirely.]]>
hits.rationale: Mechanical reputation gate in a non-branch action story.

hits.context: 1000 Spatiomancy:⮀ Here is a fun fact: Shadows count as a metaphorical corner. While using your shadow as an extra pocket is nice and all, it also makes Spatiomancy a lot more tricky in the Shadow Realms since you have to work around a lot of extra things it can latch on to; especially now that you're approaching a degree of mastery.]]>
hits.disposition: reviewed acceptable world reference outside branch-critical nodes

hits.context: 操作失败，原因是声望低：⮀ 隐士拒绝让你接近他的工作台和炼药设备，无论你多么请求或愿意支付。他告诉你，你的业力不足以让他冒险让你使用他的工作台和炼药台。]]>
hits.rationale: 非分支动作中的机制失败文本。

hits.context: 操作因声誉低而失败：⮀ 你不确定是因为显眼的连胜记录还是你呼出的酒气，但赌场安保似乎决定将你驱逐出去。高大、吓人的恶棍几乎是把你拖了出去，从他们的表情来看，他们短时间内不想再见到你。]]>
hits.disposition: reviewed acceptable world reference outside branch-critical nodes

hits.context: 成功逃脱：⮀ 当你全速冲过丛林时，喉咙灼痛，汗水顺着脸颊流下。你拼命想在身后那片浓密藤蔓封死出口之前，赶到树木之间那道狭窄的缝隙。眼看自己也许来不及了，你不顾一切地向前猛扑……随后在树线突然中断的地方脸朝下摔进了一条土路。你踉跄着站起身，长长吐出一口气，然后把目光投向这片暗影领域里取代了商顿位置的城市：商业镇。]]>
hits.disposition: reviewed acceptable world reference outside branch-critical nodes
